---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r, warnings=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(fixest)
library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(lmerTest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(fixest)
library(useful)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(dlnm)
library(ggrepel)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

```


```{r}
source("emileRegs.R")

```


# LOCAL

```{r}
data_1deg <- read_csv("processed data/gdp_temp_0_25deg.csv")
#compute growht per cell
data_1deg <- data_1deg %>%
  group_by(latlon) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    year2 = year^2,
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  #remove NAs and infinite
  filter(!is.na(growth) & is.finite(growth)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(mean_temp) & is.finite(mean_temp))

#remove RUS for 2020 and 2021
data_1deg <- data_1deg %>%
  filter(year<2020)
```

```{r}
bhm <- read_csv("raw data/bhm_data.csv") %>% filter(!is.na(growthWDI) & is.finite(growthWDI)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(UDel_temp_popweight) & is.finite(UDel_temp_popweight)) 
```




```{r}
est1 <- feols(
  growth ~ poly(mean_temp,2,raw=T) | latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year  ,
  data = data_1deg
)


conley <- fixest::vcov_conley(
    est1, lat = ~lat, lon = ~lon, 
    cutoff = "500km"
)

hac <- fixest::vcov_NW(
    est1, unit = ~latlon, time = ~year, 
    lag = 1
)

robust <- vcov(est1, vcov = "hetero")


est1 <- summary(est1, vcov = conley + hac - robust)

est_bhm <- feols(
  growthWDI ~ poly(UDel_temp_popweight,2,raw=T) | iso[time] + iso[time2] + year ,
  data = bhm
)

etable(est1)
```




```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
f <- useful::predict_poly(est1, "mean_temp", min = 0, max = 30, ref = 13, 
                           xvar_name = "temp", ci_level = 95)
f_bhm <- useful::predict_poly(est_bhm, "UDel_temp_popweight", min =0, max = 30, ref = 13, 
                           xvar_name = "temp", ci_level = 95)

#combine both
f_all <- f %>%
  mutate(source = "Local GDP") %>%
  bind_rows(
    f_bhm %>%
      mutate(source = "Global GDP")
  )

# Define colors for sources
cols <- c("Local GDP" = "dodgerblue", "Global GDP" = "firebrick2")  # vibrant blue and orange

# Manual label positions
label_pos <- data.frame(
  source = c("Local GDP", "Global GDP"),
  x = c(20, 26),
  y = c(-0.25, 0.03)
)

# Plot
ggplot(f_all, aes(x = temp, y = response, color = source, fill = source)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    data = label_pos,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = source, color = source),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 5
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(x = "Mean Annual Temperature (°C)", y = "Effect on GDP Growth Rate") +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

```{r}

#  Get unique countries
countries <- unique(data_1deg$country)

# Compute leave-one-country-out predictions
loco_list <- lapply(countries, function(c) {
  # drop country c
  df_sub <- data_1deg %>% filter(country != c)
  
  # refit model (or just use predict_poly on existing est1 if feasible)
  est_sub <- feols(
    growth ~ poly(mean_temp,2,raw=T) | latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year,
    data = df_sub,
    vcov = conley(cutoff = 500)
  )
  
  # predict poly
  pred <- useful::predict_poly(est_sub, "mean_temp", min = 0, max = 30, ref = 13)
  
  pred %>% mutate(drop_country = c)
})

# combine all LOCO predictions
f_loco <- bind_rows(loco_list) %>% mutate(source = "LOCO")

```

```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}

# Manual label positions
label_pos <- data.frame(
  source = c("Local GDP", "Global GDP"),
  x = c(17, 26),
  y = c(-0.25, 0.03)
)

#  Colors
cols <- c("Local GDP" = "dodgerblue", "Global GDP" = "firebrick2")

#  Plot
ggplot() +
  # thin gray LOCO curves first
  geom_line(data = f_loco, aes(x = temp, y = response, group = drop_country),
            color = "black", size = 0.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  # main curves
  geom_line(data = f_all, aes(x = temp, y = response, color = source), size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(data = f_all, aes(x = temp, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = source),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_text(data = label_pos, aes(x = x, y = y, label = source, color = source),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(x = "Mean Annual Temperature (°C)", y = "Effect on GDP Growth Rate") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


```


```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
#  Get unique years
years <- sort(unique(data_1deg$year))

#  Leave-one-year-out predictions
f_loyo <- bind_rows(
  lapply(years, function(y) {
    
    # drop year y
    df_sub <- data_1deg %>% filter(year != y)
    
    # refit model
    est_sub <- feols(
      growth ~ poly(mean_temp, 2, raw = TRUE) |
        latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year,
      data = df_sub,
      vcov = conley(cutoff = 500)
    )
    
    # predict polynomial
    useful::predict_poly(
      est_sub,
      "mean_temp",
      min = 0,
      max = 30,
      ref = 13
    ) %>%
      mutate(drop_year = y, source = "LOYO")
  })
)

#  Manual label positions
label_pos <- data.frame(
  source = c("Local GDP", "Global GDP"),
  x = c(17, 26),
  y = c(-0.25, 0.03)
)

#  Colors
cols <- c("Local GDP" = "dodgerblue", "Global GDP" = "firebrick2")

#  Plot
ggplot() +
  # thin gray LOCO curves first
  geom_line(data = f_loyo, aes(x = temp, y = response, group = drop_year),
            color = "black", size = 0.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  # main curves
  geom_line(data = f_all, aes(x = temp, y = response, color = source), size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(data = f_all, aes(x = temp, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = source),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_text(data = label_pos, aes(x = x, y = y, label = source, color = source),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(x = "Mean Annual Temperature (°C)", y = "Effect on GDP Growth Rate") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```



```{r}
irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data_1deg,
  outcome = "growth",
  main_var = "mean_temp",
  lags = 0:5,
  fe = "latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year",
  panel_id = c("latlon", "year"),
  vcov_formula = conley(cutoff=500),
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
) %>% mutate(type = "Distributed Lag")

irfs_wind_lp <- lp_panel(
  data = data_1deg,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "mean_temp",
  horizon = 5,
  fe = "latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year",
  panel_id = c("latlon", "year"),
  vcov_formula = conley(cutoff=500)
) %>% mutate(type = "Local Projection")

irfs_combined <- bind_rows(irfs_wind_cumulative, irfs_wind_lp)


# Plot both as a facet
ggplot(irfs_combined, aes(x = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lag, horizon), 
                          y = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", cumulative_effect, irf_mean))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = 'cornflowerblue') +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lower_ci, irf_down), 
                  ymax = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", upper_ci, irf_up)), 
              alpha = 0.2, fill = 'cornflowerblue', color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  labs(x = "Years after Treatment",
       y = "Effect on Income Growth",
       title = "IRF of Storm Treatment on Income Growth") +
  facet_wrap(~type, scales = "free_y") +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)
```




# Data CWC

```{r}
myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green
```


```{r}
data <- read_csv("raw data/CWC_2022_extreme_heat_gdp.csv") %>% 
  rename(
    countrycode = iso,
    year = time) %>% 
  mutate(year2 = year^2,
         period = case_when(
           year < 2000 ~ "pre-2000",
           year >= 2000 ~ "post 2000"
         ),
         period3 = case_when(
           year < 1980 ~ "pre-1980",
           year >= 1980 & year < 2000 ~ "1980-1999",
           year >= 2000 ~ "post-2000"
         ),
         decade = floor(year / 10) * 10
         )

# create percentiles of maxwind and nlands and energy
data <- data %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  mutate(
    tx5d_p95 = quantile(tx5d, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    tx7d_p95 = quantile(tx7d, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    tx3d_p95 = quantile(tx3d, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    tx5d_rawtreat = ifelse(tx5d >= tx5d_p95, 1, 0),
    tx7d_rawtreat = ifelse(tx7d >= tx7d_p95, 1, 0),
    tx3d_rawtreat = ifelse(tx3d >= tx3d_p95, 1, 0),
    drought_p95 = quantile(pdsi, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    drought_rawtreat = ifelse(pdsi >= drought_p95, 1, 0),
    flood_p95 = quantile(pdsi, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    flood_rawtreat = ifelse(pdsi >= flood_p95, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()





make_shock <- function(
  data,
  var,
  p = 0.95,
  baseline_start = 1979,
  baseline_end   = 2016
) {

  fe_model <- lm(
    reformulate(
      "as.factor(region) + as.factor(year)",
      response = var
    ),
    data = data
  )

  shock_name <- paste0(var, "_shock")
  treat_name <- paste0(var, "_treat")
  treat_forever_name <- paste0(var, "_treat_forever")
  first_treat_name <- paste0(var, "_first_treat_year")
  thresh_name <- paste0(shock_name, "_p")

  data[[shock_name]] <- resid(fe_model)

  # 🔹 GLOBAL threshold across all countries (baseline window only)
  global_thresh <- quantile(
    data[[shock_name]][
      data$year >= baseline_start & data$year <= baseline_end
    ],
    p,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  data <- data %>%
    group_by(countrycode) %>%
    mutate(

      # same threshold for everyone
      !!thresh_name := global_thresh,

      # treatment defined using global threshold
      !!treat_name := as.integer(
        .data[[shock_name]] >= global_thresh
      ),

      # zero out if underlying variable is zero
      !!treat_name := ifelse(.data[[var]] > 0, .data[[treat_name]], 0),

      # first treatment year
      !!first_treat_name := if_else(
        any(.data[[treat_name]] == 1),
        min(year[.data[[treat_name]] == 1]),
        NA_real_
      ),

      # treat forever
      !!treat_forever_name := as.integer(
        !is.na(.data[[first_treat_name]]) &
          year >= .data[[first_treat_name]]
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  return(data)
}



data <- data %>%
 make_shock("tx5d") %>%
 make_shock("pdsi") 



```








# ANALYSES


#  FE-DL




```{r}
irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data,
  outcome = "growth",
  main_var = "tx5d",
  lags = -5:10,
  fe = "region[year] + region[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("region", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
)

# Plot
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(irfs_wind_cumulative, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci),
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect",
    title = "Cumulative Distributed Lag Effects"
  )
```

```{r}
results_list <- list()

lag_specs <- list(
  "5 lags" = -5:5,
  "10 lags" = -5:10,
  "12 lags" = -5:12,
  "15 lags" = -5:15
)

for (spec_name in names(lag_specs)) {
  results_list[[spec_name]] <- cumulative_dl(
    data = data,
    outcome = "growth",
    main_var = "tx5d",
    lags = lag_specs[[spec_name]],
    fe = "region[year] + region[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("region", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
    shock_label = spec_name
  )
}

# Combine all results
all_results <- bind_rows(results_list, .id = "specification")

# Plot with different specifications
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, 
                        color = specification, fill = specification)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect on GDP growth",
    title = "Robustness to Lag Length Specification",
    color = "Specification",
    fill = "Specification"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Alternative: Faceted plot for clearer comparison
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ specification, nrow = 2) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect on GDP growth",
    title = "Robustness to Lag Length Specification"
  )
```





```{r}
results_continent <- cumulative_dl_interact(
  data = data ,
  outcome = "growth",
  main_var = "tx5d_rawtreat",
  interact_var = "period",
  lags = -5:10,
  fe = "region[year] + region[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("region", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
)

# Plot
ggplot(results_continent, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)
```






```{r}
results_continent <- cumulative_dl_interact(
  data = data,
  outcome = "growth",
  main_var = "tx5d_rawtreat",
  interact_var = "decade",
  lags = -5:10,
  fe = "region[year] + region[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("region", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
)

# Plot
ggplot(results_continent, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)
```

# LP



```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, warning=FALSE}

outcome = "lgdp_pc_usd"
horizon = 10
fe = "region[year] + region[year2] + year "
controls = NULL

irfs_1 <- lp_panel(
  data = data,
  outcome = outcome,
  main_var = "tx5d_rawtreat",
  controls = controls,
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = fe,
  panel_id = c("region", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% 
  mutate(shock = "tx5d")

irfs_2 <- lp_panel(
  data = data,
  outcome = outcome,
  main_var = "flood_rawtreat",
  controls = controls,
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = fe,
  panel_id = c("region", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>%
  mutate(shock = "flood")


irfs_3 <- lp_panel(
  data = data,
  outcome = outcome,
  controls = controls,
  main_var = "drought_rawtreat",
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = fe,
  panel_id = c("region", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>%
  mutate(shock = "drought")

irfs_all <- bind_rows(
  irfs_1,
  irfs_2,
  irfs_3
)


ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, fill = myred
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myred) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "lgdp_pc_usd"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "region[year] + region[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("region", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "tx5d",
    "tx5d_rawtreat",
    "pdsi",
    "flood_rawtreat",
    "drought_rawtreat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "tx5d",
    "tx5d Treat",
    "PDSI",
    "Flood Treat",
    "Drought Treat"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )


```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_sqkm",
    "nlands",
    "nlands_sqkm",
    "energy",
    "energy_sqkm"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

```





## Shock Bilal



```{r}

plot_shock_trends <- function(data, shock_var, break_year) {
  
  data %>%
    group_by( year) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_shock = mean(.data[[shock_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = avg_shock)) +
    
    # raw series
    geom_line(color = "black", size = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(color = "black", size = 2, alpha = 0.5) +
    
    # pre-break slope
    geom_smooth(
      data = function(d) d %>% filter(year < break_year),
      method = "lm",
      se = FALSE,
      color = "blue",
      size = 0.9
    ) +
    
    # post-break slope
    geom_smooth(
      data = function(d) d %>% filter(year >= break_year),
      method = "lm",
      se = FALSE,
      color = "red",
      size = 0.9
    ) +
    
    # break line
    geom_vline(
      xintercept = break_year,
      linetype = "dashed",
      size = 0.7
    ) +
    
    #facet_wrap(~ continent, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
    labs(
      x = "Year",
      y = paste("Average", shock_var)
    )
}

break_year <- 1980

plot_shock_trends(data, "tx5d", break_year)
plot_shock_trends(data, "tx7d", break_year)
plot_shock_trends(data, "pdsi", break_year)




```

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, message=FALSE}
break_year <- 2

plot_df <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    sum_maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_treat, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum_energy_treat  = sum(energy_treat, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum_nlands_treat  = sum(nlands_treat, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("sum_"),
    names_to = "treat_var",
    values_to = "sum_treat"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    period = ifelse(year < break_year, "Pre", "Post")
  )

# averages per variable × period
avg_df <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(treat_var, period) %>%
  summarise(
    avg = mean(sum_treat, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = year, y = sum_treat)) +

  # --------------------
  # BLACK observed series, broken at break_year
  # --------------------
  geom_line(
    data = subset(plot_df, year < break_year),
    color = "black",
    size = 1
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = subset(plot_df, year >= break_year),
    color = "black",
    size = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(color = "black", size = 2) +

  # --------------------
  # PERIOD-COLORED TRENDS
  # --------------------
  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(plot_df, year < break_year),
    aes(color = period),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    size = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(plot_df, year >= break_year),
    aes(color = period),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    size = 0.9
  ) +

  # --------------------
  # PERIOD-COLORED AVERAGES
  # --------------------
  geom_hline(
    data = avg_df,
    aes(yintercept = avg, color = period),
    linetype = "dashed",
    size = 1
  ) +

  # --------------------
  # BREAK LINE
  # --------------------
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = break_year,
    linetype = "dashed",
    size = 0.7
  ) +

  facet_wrap(
    ~ treat_var,
    scales = "free_y",
    labeller = as_labeller(c(
      sum_maxwind_treat = "Wind Exposure",
      sum_energy_treat  = "Energy Exposure",
      sum_nlands_treat  = "# Landfalls"
    ))
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      Pre  = myblue,
      Post = myred
    )
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Sum of Treatment Indicator",
    color = "Period"
  )


```



## IRF

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, message=FALSE}
# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_sqkm_shock = "Maximum Wind Speed per sqkm",
  nlands_sqkm_shock = "Number of Landfalls per sqkm",
  energy_sqkm_shock = "Storm Energy per sqkm"
)

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myred) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myred) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_shock",
    "maxwind_sqkm_shock",
    "nlands_shock",
    "nlands_sqkm_shock",
    "energy_shock",
    "energy_sqkm_shock"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_shock",
    "maxwind_sqkm_shock",
    "nlands_shock",
    "nlands_sqkm_shock",
    "energy_shock",
    "energy_sqkm_shock"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc %>% filter(continent == "Americas")
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) +ggtitle('Americas')

```



## Event studies


### Unresidualized


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_shock_unres",
    "maxwind_sqkm_shock_unres",
    "nlands_shock_unres",
    "nlands_sqkm_shock_unres",
    "energy_shock_unres",
    "energy_sqkm_shock_unres"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

```

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, message=FALSE}
# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_sqkm_treat = "Maximum Wind Speed per sqkm",
  nlands_sqkm_treat = "Number of Landfalls per sqkm",
  energy_sqkm_treat = "Storm Energy per sqkm"
)

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myblue) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myblue) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"
controls <- c("init_gdp_usd_pc_1970")


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```

# Continent

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "lgdp_pc_usd"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "region[year] + region[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "continent"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "tx5d_treat",
    "flood_treat",
    "drought_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y temp",
    "1/20y flood",
    "1/20y drought"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data %>% filter( continent %in% c("Africa", "Asia", "Americas", "Oceania"))
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```




# Is it shaped by rich/poor

```{r}
world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
map_data <- left_join(world, data_tc, by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode"))
```

```{r}
ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = credit_bin),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Blues",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "Domestic credit"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_bin),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_group),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_sqkm",
    "nlands",
    "nlands_sqkm",
    "energy",
    "energy_sqkm"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>=1990)
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"
controls <- NULL


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>=1990)
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "credit_bin"
controls <- NULL


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_group"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>=1990)
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```




# DiD


```{r}
data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    treat_year = ifelse(any(treat== 1), min(year[treat == 1]), 9999)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

did_sunab <- feols(
  loggdp ~ sunab(treat_year, year) |
    countrycode[year] + year,
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  cluster = ~countrycode
)

# --- extract event-study coefficients ----
es_df <- broom::tidy(did_sunab) %>%
  filter(grepl("year::", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    event_time = as.numeric(sub(".*::", "", term),
                            errors = "coerce"),
    # pre-treatment = rel_time < 0
    period = ifelse(event_time < 0, "Pre-treatment", "Post-treatment")
  ) %>% 
  filter(event_time >= -5 & event_time <= 15)


# --- pretty plot ----
ggplot(es_df, aes(x = event_time, y = estimate, color = period, fill = period)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
                  ymax = estimate + 1.96 * std.error),
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Pre-treatment"  = "#1f78b4",   # blue
    "Post-treatment" = "#e31a1c"    # red
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Pre-treatment"  = "#1f78b4",
    "Post-treatment" = "#e31a1c"
  )) +
  
  labs(
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```
```{r}
data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
    mutate(
      g = ifelse(any(treat == 1), min(year[treat == 1]), 9999)  # never-treated units get 9999
    ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(countryid = as.numeric(factor(countrycode)))


cs <- att_gt(
  yname   = "loggdp",
  tname   = "year",
  idname  = "countryid",
  gname   = "g",
  data    = data_tc,
  panel   = TRUE
)

es <- aggte(cs, type = "dynamic")

cs_plot <- data.frame(
  event_time = es$egt,
  att = es$att.egt,
  se  = es$se.egt
) %>%
  mutate(
    period = ifelse(event_time < 0, "Pre", "Post")
  ) %>% 
  filter(event_time >= -5 & event_time <= 15)


ggplot(cs_plot, aes(x = event_time, y = att,
                    color = period, fill = period)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7,color='gray') +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = att - 1.96 * se,
                  ymax = att + 1.96 * se),
              alpha = 0.25, color = NA) +
  
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre" = "#1f78b4",  # blue
                                "Post" = "#e31a1c")) +  # red
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre" = "#1f78b4",
                               "Post" = "#e31a1c")) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Event Time (relative year)",
    y = "ATT",
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  #att vline at 0
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.7) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
```


```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=8}
summary(cs)
ggdid(cs, ncol=3,xgap=10)
```


```{r}
lpdid(data_tc %>% filter(year >= 1990),
      window = c(-5, 15), y = "loggdp",outcome_lags = 0,
      unit_index = "countrycode", time_index = "year" ,
      treat_status = "maxwind_treat") -> reg

reg_df <- as.data.frame(reg$coeftable)

reg_df$event_time <- -5:15

lpdid_plot <- reg_df %>%
  transmute(
    event_time,
    att = Estimate,
    se  = `Std. Error`,
    period = ifelse(event_time <= 0, "Pre", "Post")
  )


ggplot(lpdid_plot, aes(x = event_time, y = att,
                    color = period, fill = period)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = att - 1.96 * se,
                  ymax = att + 1.96 * se),
              alpha = 0.25, color = NA) +
  
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre" = "#1f78b4",  # blue
                                "Post" = "#e31a1c")) +  # red
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre" = "#1f78b4",
                               "Post" = "#e31a1c")) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Event Time (relative year)",
    y = "ATT",
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
```

```{r}

did_ch <- did_multiplegt_dyn(
    df = data_tc %>% filter(year >= 1990),
    outcome = "loggdp",
    group = "countrycode",
    time = "year",
    trends_lin = T,
    treatment = "maxwind_treat",
    effects = 15,
    placebo = 5,
    cluster = "countrycode"
)
summary(did_ch)

did_chplot <- did_ch$plot$data %>%
  mutate(
    period = ifelse(Time < 0, "Pre", ifelse(Time > 0, "Post",""))
  )



ggplot(did_chplot, aes(x = Time, y = Estimate,
                    color = period, fill = period)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = LB.CI, ymax = UB.CI),
              alpha = 0.25, color = NA) +
  
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre" = "#1f78b4",
                                "Post" = "#e31a1c")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre" = "#1f78b4",
                               "Post" = "#e31a1c")) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Event Time (relative year)",
    y = "ATT",
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
```


# MAPS

```{r}

data_tc_filtered <- data_tc %>% filter(maxwind>0 | nlands>0)
ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc_filtered %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(mean_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mean_maxwind), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "YlOrRd",
    direction = 1,
    na.value = "darkblue",
    name = "Mean Max Wind"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc_filtered %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(n_landfalls = mean(nlands, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = n_landfalls), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("darkblue", RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")),
    values = scales::rescale(
      c(
        0,
        min(data_tc_filtered$nlands[data_tc_filtered$nlands > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
        max(data_tc_filtered$nlands, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    ),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "# Landfalls"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()



```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
```




```{r}
H <- 20  # horizon
irf_list <- list()

for (h in 0:H) {
  
  
  # FE model with interaction between maxwind_sqkm and country
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp,h) - l(loggdp,1)  ~ i(countrycode,nlands_treat) | countrycode[year]  + year,
    data = data_tc, panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  # Extract coefficients and SEs
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[,2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

# Combine all horizons
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_extreme <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = estimate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se,
    sig = ifelse(lower > 0 | upper < 0, "significant", "nonsignificant")
  )


# Join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_extreme, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white") +
scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = scales::brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
  breaks  = c(-15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15) / 100,
  limits  = c(-0.15, 0.15),
  labels  = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
  na.value = "grey",
  name = "GDP growth"
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Landfalls"
    
  )
```



```{r}
H <- 20  # horizon
irf_list <- list()

for (h in 0:H) {
  
  
  # FE model with interaction between maxwind_sqkm and country
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp,h) - l(loggdp,1)  ~ i(countrycode,maxwind_treat) | countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year,
    data = data_tc, panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  # Extract coefficients and SEs
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[,2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

# Combine all horizons
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_extreme <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = estimate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se,
    sig = ifelse(lower > 0 | upper < 0, "significant", "nonsignificant")
  )


# Join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_extreme, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white") +
scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = scales::brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
  breaks  = c(-15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15) / 100,
  limits  = c(-0.15, 0.15),
  labels  = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
  na.value = "grey",
  name = "GDP growth"
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
  ) 
```





```{r}

H <- 40 # horizon
irf_list <- list()
for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat) |
      countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year ,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  ) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    # Find first horizon where lower CI < 0
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(lower < 0), min(horizon[lower < 0]), NA),
    # Find first horizon where lower CI >= 0 AFTER going below zero
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(lower < 0) & any(lower >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[lower < 0])),
      min(horizon[lower >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[lower < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    # Calculate recovery time
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,  # Never went below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ Inf,     # Went below 0 but never returned
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero  # Number of steps to recover
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time),color='white') +
scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = rev(scales::brewer_pal(type = "seq", palette = "YlOrRd", direction = -1)(9)),
  breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25,30),
  limits = c(0, 40),
  na.value = "grey",
  name = "Recovery time (years)",
  labels = c("0", "5", "10", "15", "20", "25","30")
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12)
  ) 
```

```{r}

H <- 40 # horizon
irf_list <- list()
for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ i(countrycode, nlands_treat) |
      countrycode + year ,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  ) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    # Find first horizon where lower CI < 0
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(lower < 0), min(horizon[lower < 0]), NA),
    # Find first horizon where lower CI >= 0 AFTER going below zero
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(lower < 0) & any(lower >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[lower < 0])),
      min(horizon[lower >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[lower < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    # Calculate recovery time
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,  # Never went below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ Inf,     # Went below 0 but never returned
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero  # Number of steps to recover
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time),color='white') +
scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = rev(scales::brewer_pal(type = "seq", palette = "YlOrRd", direction = -1)(9)),
  breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25,30),
  limits = c(0, 40),
  na.value = "grey",
  name = "Recovery time (years)",
  labels = c("0", "5", "10", "15", "20", "25","30")
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12)
  ) 
```
